creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hi!

Due to the lack of free time I have to drop the maintainership of my ports.

ksteakitself seems to be dead: There was no activity since 2004.

Best regards,


Heiner

Fix: --Boundary-00=_yACBMeJHbgznIyv

  charset="iso 8859-15";
  name="Makefile.diff"

	filename="Makefile.diff"



--Boundary-00=_yACBMeJHbgznIyv----gdxiweAsEW34HUlkB4YH8fJA5KZ0sUvuZeODI7HFFukxRTZD
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig	2010-05-31 22:43:17.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile	2010-05-31 22:43:43.000000000 +0200
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.der-fritz.de/ksteak/
 DISTNAME=	ksteak-1.0.0pre2
 
-MAINTAINER=	h.eichmann@gmx.de
+MAINTAINER=	ports@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=	KDE frontend for steak, an english - german dictionary
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	steak:${PORTSDIR}/german/steak
